seo.title: Custom Tailwind demo — Landing UI
seo.description: Demo page showing classes (multi-layer Tailwind) in JSON config.

sections.message: This page uses custom Tailwind via the "classes" field in JSON.

sections.headline: Custom Tailwind in JSON
sections.subheadline: Use the "classes" object on any section to override root, title, subtitle, buttons, image. AI or no-code can inject Tailwind classes without touching React.

classes.title: text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-amber-900 sm:text-6xl
classes.subtitle: text-xl text-amber-800/90 max-w-2xl mx-auto
classes.primaryButton: rounded-full bg-amber-500 text-white px-8 shadow-lg hover:bg-amber-600

items.title: card
items.description: Feature card. e.g. rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl.

classes.title: text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800
classes.subtitle: text-slate-600
classes.card: rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-200

sections.title: Ready to customize?
sections.subtitle: Add "classes" to your section config and pass any Tailwind classes.

classes.title: text-4xl font-bold text-white
classes.subtitle: text-slate-300
classes.primaryButton: rounded-lg bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white font-semibold px-8
